# arena_team (Resource)

team resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "arena_org" "nav_dev" {
  name        = "nav-dev"
  description = "developer group for navigation systems"
}

resource "arena_team" "auto_flight" {
  name        = "path-planning"
  role        = "devs"
  org_id      = arena_org.nav_dev.id // teams must have a parent org
  description = "dev team working on autonomous path planning"
  config = {
    allow_cross_orgs = true
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The unique name of the basis
- `org_id` (String) organization id this team belongs to

### Optional

- `config` (Attributes) configuration for the team (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config))
- `description` (String) A description of the basis
- `inactive` (Boolean) whether the team is inactive
- `role` (String) role of the team

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) The timestamp when the basis was created
- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the basis
- `updated` (String) The timestamp when the basis was last updated
- `version` (Number) The version of the basis

<a id="nestedatt--config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config`

Optional:

- `allow_cross_org` (Boolean) whether to allow user from other orgs, default false
- `sync_with` (String) configuration for autosync with external oauth group
